nordpool_area.name: Nordpool Area
nordpool_area.description: The Nordpool area to fetch prices for (e.g. NL, BE, SE3).

currency.name: Currency
currency.description: The currency to display prices in (e.g. EUR, SEK).

solarman_battery_soc.name: Battery SOC Sensor
solarman_battery_soc.description: The entity-ID for the battery SOC sensor.

battery_capacity_kwh.name: Battery Capacity (kWh)
battery_capacity_kwh.description: The total usable capacity of your battery pack in kWh.

max_charge_rate_kw.name: Max Charge Rate (kW)
max_charge_rate_kw.description: The maximum charge rate from the grid.

charge_threshold_pct.name: Charge Threshold (%)
charge_threshold_pct.description: The percentage of the daily average price below which the battery will charge.

discharge_threshold_pct.name: Discharge Threshold (%)
discharge_threshold_pct.description: The percentage of the daily average price above which the battery will discharge.
